# ICCQ — International Conference on Code Quality

> ICCQ is a peer-reviewed, one-day academic computer science conference focused on static and dynamic analysis, program verification, programming language design, software bug detection, and software maintenance. It has been held annually since 2021. Chair: Yegor Bugayenko (yegor256@gmail.com). Homepage: https://www.iccq.ru

## Editions

- [ICCQ-2026 — 6th edition, 12 December 2026, Novosibirsk, Russia (hybrid)](https://www.iccq.ru/2026.html)
- [ICCQ-2025 — 5th edition, 13 December 2025, Ekaterinburg, Russia](https://www.iccq.ru/2025.html)
- [ICCQ-2024 — 4th edition, 22 June 2024, Innopolis University, Russia](https://www.iccq.ru/2024.html)
- [ICCQ-2023 — 3rd edition, 22 April 2023, St. Petersburg, Russia](https://www.iccq.ru/2023.html)
- [ICCQ-2022 — 2nd edition, 23 April 2022, Innopolis, Kazan, Russia](https://www.iccq.ru/2022.html)
- [ICCQ-2021 — 1st edition, 27 March 2021, online](https://www.iccq.ru/2021.html)

## Topics

- Static and dynamic program analysis
- Program verification and formal methods
- Programming language design
- Software bug detection
- Software maintenance and evolution

## Publication

Proceedings are submitted to IEEE Xplore and indexed by DBLP, Scopus, and Web of Science.
